title: guzmania lingulata var. lingulata
intro: Guzmania lingulata var. lingulata, also known as the 'Lingulata Air Plant', is a species of epiphytic flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae, characterized by its compact rosettes of strap-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its chemical compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Guzmania lingulata var. lingulata include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies through infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which are used to treat various ailments, including fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions.
